title: Attune ruling
description: One line of a rulings.jsonl store. The store is append-only: a later row with the same id replaces the earlier row; a row whose supersedes names an id retires that id.

id.description: Kebab-case identifier; the meaning lives in the name, never in a numeric suffix.

ruling.description: The enforceable judgment, written so a future session can apply it without the originating conversation.

rationale.description: Why the user ruled this way; present when the reason was stated.

oracle.description: Provenance marks: 'human ruled' (present on every ruling), 'per <source>' for research that informed it, 'per experiment <name>' for evidence built by an experiment. Consumed by the consolidate skill when deciding what may merge.

provenance.description: Free-form origin note, e.g. the file a seed ruling migrated from.

scope.description: Validity axes: 'global' (every session), 'medium:<m>' (applies when producing that medium, e.g. medium:blog, medium:commit), 'project:<dir-basename>' (sessions whose project directory matches). The sheet generator selects by these.

status.description: 'active' rulings render into the sheet; 'superseded' and 'retired' rows are history. The generator derives effective status from later same-id rows and supersedes references.

supersedes.description: Id of the ruling this row absorbs or retires; present only on consolidation and reversal rows.
